channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pavements & gutters full of mud & vegetation, 27th March
item.description:
Street cleaners pick up litter in this section of the road but never actually sweep pavements or gutters between 63 & 99 Carpenter Gardens. No sweeping has taken place for years.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Carpenter Gardens, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal food seller, 27th March
item.description:
Causing fat splashes on pavement and illegal too!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 119, Newington Causeway, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Handrail missing on stairs, 27th March
item.description:
There is a set of stairs that elderly people use every day, I have witnessed a few people struggling to reach over a gap in the handrail where there is a long section of pole missing. A man already fell and seriously injured himself there two Christmases ago.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bexley Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 26th March
item.description:
Graffiti on bin next to bus stop

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 26th March
item.description:
Graffiti under railway bridge on Norman Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norman Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 26th March
item.description:
Dumped wood taped up on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Midhurst Hill, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multi cars blocking drive double yellow with blips, 26th March
item.description:
Multi cars blocking drive double yellow with blips
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wood scattered over part of dual carraigeway, 26th March
item.description:
Just after the turn off for the roundabout. Drove over it and it made my car jump up and down and heard the wood jumping up onto my car. dangerous especially if people loose control of their car

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Byron Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: CPZ parking info plate fully obscured by black paint, 26th March
item.description:
This is a repeat occurrence of incidents logged in Feb 2026 (8876142), June 2025 (7711683) and 29 Sept 2025 (8227575). However this is the first time that the sign has been obscured in full. Note that this CPZ sign was restored to a lower position on the pole after temporary removal for filming in Dec 2023, so it could be raised to be out of reach of vandals, matching height of other signs in the locality.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 285, Camberwell New Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 53 Brecknock Road, 26th March
item.description:
Pavement has been badly broken up, loose blocks of concrete on street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 186, Leighton Road, Tufnell Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dunmore Rd opposite No 1, 26th March
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunmore Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Street light not working, 26th March
item.description:
Street light is not working from last few days. As a result it’s too dark on street. The faulty street light is outside 52 Norlands crescent, Chislehurst BR7 5RN. Please fix it as soon as possible. Thanks !
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norlands Crescent, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 26th March
item.description:
The street light between 52 and 54 Norlands crescent in Chislehurst has stopped working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norlands Crescent, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on grass verge, 26th March
item.description:
Thank you for clearing some of the litter on the grass verge. There is still some nearby the bush/hedge which will be obscured by parked cars.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alsike Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of items, 26th March
item.description:
Fly tipping of a clear plastic dining chair, a baby’s play seat and some general cardboard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Cross Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 26th March
item.description:
Someone dumped rubbish and please see the uploaded photo

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kellaway Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road Markings Crittall's Corner Roundabout, 26th March
item.description:
The road markings on Crittall's Corner roundabout designed to designate between A20/A223/A224 are beyond faded and practically non existent (particularly the middle line). It is not clear upon entering where one lane ends and the other starts and is highly dangerous. Please repaint.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sidcup By-pass, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Between bus stand and house at number 2, 26th March
item.description:
Large piece of hardboard
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coverdale Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Graffiti, 26th March
item.description:
Graffiti on wall leading down to the A2 motorway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Rochester Way, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road surface very bad on gravel hill/bloomfield road', 26th March
item.description:
Hi, you have advised me that my earlier report regarding to the poor road surface/ pothole at top of Gravel hill just pass Bloomfield road near the bus stop, does not meet the council standard to have the road surface repaired. Can l ask has the traffic management team been to review the road surface, as it’s a short distance from the council office as l don’t understand the reason for not having the surface repaired it’s not is a suitable standard for road users or even cyclists
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gravel Hill, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
